forbidden.name: domain-db-pure
forbidden.comment: domain/ and db/ are plain TS with no UI dependencies. This is what keeps them runnable in Node (vitest, better-sqlite3) with zero mocking.

forbidden.name: only-native-touches-capacitor
forbidden.comment: Bridge isolation (capacitor-builder): only src/native/ may import @capacitor/*. Everything else consumes the plain-TS adapters it exports.
